---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report an issue with documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## 📚 Documentation Issue

**Location:** [e.g., README.md, docs/api.md, line 123]

**Issue Type:**
- [ ] Typo/Grammar
- [ ] Incorrect Information
- [ ] Missing Information
- [ ] Unclear Explanation
- [ ] Broken Link
- [ ] Other

## 📝 Description

Describe the issue with the documentation.

## ✅ Suggested Fix

If you have a suggestion for how to fix this, please describe it here.

## 📎 Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the documentation issue.

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I have checked that this documentation issue hasn't been reported
- [ ] I have provided the location of the issue
- [ ] I have suggested a fix (if applicable)
